title: dichondra evolvulacea f. macrocalyx
intro: Dichondra evolvulacea f. macrocalyx is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Dichondra evolvulacea f. macrocalyx include treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as exhibiting potential anti-diabetic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparations.
